modules.sql: SELECT bucket.amount_bucket, bucket.event_count, bucket.total_amount, src_ifw_effective_date.ifw_effective_date FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN overdraft_amount <= 50 THEN '0-50' WHEN overdraft_amount <= 100 THEN '50-100' WHEN overdraft_amount <= 250 THEN '100-250' WHEN overdraft_amount <= 500 THEN '250-500' ELSE '500+' END AS amount_bucket, COUNT(*) AS event_count, SUM(overdraft_amount) AS total_amount FROM overdraft_events GROUP BY CASE WHEN overdraft_amount <= 50 THEN '0-50' WHEN overdraft_amount <= 100 THEN '50-100' WHEN overdraft_amount <= 250 THEN '100-250' WHEN overdraft_amount <= 500 THEN '250-500' ELSE '500+' END HAVING COUNT(*) > 0) bucket CROSS JOIN (SELECT ifw_effective_date FROM overdraft_events LIMIT 1) src_ifw_effective_date ORDER BY CASE bucket.amount_bucket WHEN '0-50' THEN 1 WHEN '50-100' THEN 2 WHEN '100-250' THEN 3 WHEN '250-500' THEN 4 WHEN '500+' THEN 5 END
